title: Unique Party 64263 - 40cm Royal Blue Tissue Paper Fan Decoration
features: Royal Blue Hanging Decoration measures approximately 40cm (16") in diameter
An elegant addition to party decor at a birthday party, fundraiser, graduation party, Hanukkah celebration or other special occasion
Decorative fan brings a burst of classic colour to doorways, archways and windows, or hang it from the ceiling above party tables
Coordinate with other royal blue party decorations and party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Add a bold decorative flourish to any special occasion with this delightful Royal Blue Tissue Paper Decorative Fan. This tissue paper fan is ideal for adding a burst of majestic colour to a whole range of party occasions and family gatherings. Hang the paper fan decoration above a party table for graceful simplicity, or combine with other paper decorations hung at varying lengths from the ceiling for a stunning effect. Box Contains 1 x Paper Fan
